member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for the RabbitMQ transport.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.HostName
member.summary: The RabbitMQ broker hostname. Required.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.Port
member.summary: The AMQP port. Default is 5672.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.UserName
member.summary: Authentication username. Default is "guest".

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.Password
member.summary: Authentication password. Default is "guest".

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.VirtualHost
member.summary: RabbitMQ virtual host. Default is "/".

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.PublishChannelPoolSize
member.summary: Number of pooled publish channels. Default is 4. Must be ≥ 1.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.HeartbeatInterval
member.summary: TCP heartbeat interval for dead-connection detection. Default is 60 seconds.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.NetworkRecoveryInterval
member.summary: Interval between auto-recovery retry attempts. Default is 5 seconds.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.UseSsl
member.summary: Whether to use TLS for the connection. Default is false.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration.Validate
member.summary: Validates the configuration and throws if required fields are missing or invalid.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqSubscription
member.summary: Manages a single RabbitMQ subscription (one channel, one consumer).

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqSubscription.#ctor(RabbitMQ.Client.IChannel,System.String,System.Func{System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqSubscription.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts consuming messages from the queue.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqTransport
member.summary: RabbitMQ transport implementation using two connections (publish/consume) with channel pooling for publishers and auto-recovery.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqTransport.#ctor(Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqTransport})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the RabbitMQ transport with the message bus.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.ServiceCollectionExtensions.UseRabbitMq(Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder,System.Action{Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration})
member.summary: Configures the message bus to use RabbitMQ as the sole transport (backward compatible). Sets RabbitMQ as the default transport.
member.param: An action to configure the RabbitMQ connection settings.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRabbitMq(Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder,System.Action{Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers RabbitMQ as a named transport using the default name "RabbitMQ".
member.param: An action to configure the RabbitMQ connection settings.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRabbitMq(Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Messaggero.Transport.RabbitMQ.RabbitMqConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers RabbitMQ as a named transport with the specified name.
member.param: The name to register the transport under.
An action to configure the RabbitMQ connection settings.
